title.rendered: [Free Webinar] How Nonprofits Can Transform Year-End Giving with AI

content.rendered:
Date: Wednesday, October 29, 2025
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (1 hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Dr. Kamran Razvan, CEO at Click & Pledge

No two donors are the same. If you don’t want to leave anything on the table for year-end giving 2025, you need to know what makes them each unique. Successful nonprofits know what to ask, when to ask, how much to ask, and why. But as your donor database grows, that becomes a data-induced challenge.

Solving this challenge is imperative, but thanks to the power of AI, knowing every donor’s ins and outs is easier than ever. Join this free webinar to learn how to harness AI to help make this your most successful year-end fundraising yet.

• Why data matters when interacting with donors
• How to avoid data silos and create a personalized experience for donors
• How AI can help maximize every “ask” you make to donors, especially for year-end fundraising

 Register Now!

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, you will be sent a link to the recording within 24 hours after the webinar is over. Visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.

excerpt.rendered: Join this free webinar to learn how to harness AI to help make this your most successful year-end fundraising yet. Attendees will learn why data matters when interacting with donors and how to avoid data silos and create a personalized experience for donors.
